statement: When asked to rank the most important issues in the EU debate, Icelandic voters consistently prioritise fisheries policy (cited by ~60% as a top concern), sovereignty and democratic self-governance (~50%), economic stability and currency (~45%), and agricultural policy (~30%). Environmental and climate policy has risen from ~15% in 2022 to ~25% in 2025 as a salient issue.
caveats: Issue salience is sensitive to framing and current events. Rankings may shift significantly in the months leading up to the referendum as campaign messaging intensifies.

related_entries.statement: Gallup polls conducted in Iceland between 2022 and early 2026 show a gradual shift in public opinion on EU membership. Support for applying for EU membership rose from approximately 30% in 2022 to around 45% by late 2025, while opposition declined from roughly 50% to 40%. The remainder were undecided. The trend accelerated following the Althingi's decision in 2024 to hold a binding referendum.

Polling data consistently shows that support for EU membership in Iceland is higher among younger voters (18–34: ~55% in favour), urban residents in the capital region (~50%), and those with university education (~52%). Opposition is strongest among older voters (55+: ~50% opposed), rural residents (~55% opposed), and those employed in agriculture and fisheries (~65% opposed).

citations.report_title: 390.000 hektarar af landbúnaðarlandi breytast í skóg og votlendi

claims.claim_text: Ef Ísland færi í aðildarviðræður væri eðlilegt að landbúnaður yrði eitt af lykilmálunum.

citations.report_title: Björn hrekur fullyrðingu um afdrif sjávarauðlinda Íslendinga í ESB

claims.claim_text: Þjóðin hefur mestar áhyggjur af sjávarauðlindinni þegar kemur að hugsanlegri ESB-aðild.

citations.report_title: Engin fordæmi fyrir leið Íslands í átt að ESB

claims.claim_text: Stærstu spurningarnar um ESB-aðild Íslands lúta að þeim atriðum sem semja þarf um og hvort niðurstaðan verði ásættanleg.

citations.report_title: Þrír hópar sem myndu hagnast mest á aðild Íslands að Evrópusambandinu

claims.claim_text: Sjávarútvegur og landbúnaður verða áhersluþáttur í aðildarviðræðum Íslands við ESB.
